zh.lifeSummary: 當William Browne於1534年2月1日出生在英國素瑞霍利時，他的父親John Browne21歲，母親Joan Ferret32歲。他於1558年11月14日與Magdalene Elsick在英國素瑞霍利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1561年在英國素瑞霍利被列為vicar。他去世於1613年11月14日在英國素瑞霍利享年79歲，埋葬在英國素瑞霍利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Browne于1534年2月1日出生在英国素瑞霍利时，他的父亲John Browne21岁，母亲Joan Ferret32岁。他于1558年11月14日与Magdalene Elsick在英国素瑞霍利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1561年在英国素瑞霍利被列为vicar。他去世于1613年11月14日在英国素瑞霍利享年79岁，埋葬在英国素瑞霍利。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Browne was born on 1 February 1534, in Horley, Surrey, England, his father, John Browne, was 21 and his mother, Joan Ferret, was 32. He married Magdalene Elsick on 14 November 1558, in Horley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. In 1561, his occupation is listed as vicar in Horley, Surrey, England. He died on 14 November 1613, in Horley, Surrey, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Horley, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Browne est né le 1 février 1534, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Browne, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Ferret, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Magdalene Elsick le 14 novembre 1558, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. En 1561, sa profession de son indiquée est vicar à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 14 novembre 1613, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Browne am 1. Februar 1534 in Horley, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Browne 21 und seine Mutter Joan Ferret 32. Er hat am 14. November 1558 in Horley, Surrey, England Magdalene Elsick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1561 ist sein Beruf als vicar in Horley, Surrey, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. November 1613 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Horley, Surrey, England und wurde in Horley, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Browne è nato il il 1 febbraio 1534 nel Horley, Surrey, England, il suo padre, John Browne, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joan Ferret, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Magdalene Elsick il 14 novembre 1558, nel Horley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1561, la sua occupazione è indicata come vicar nel Horley, Surrey, England. Morì il 14 novembre 1613, nel Horley, Surrey, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Horley, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Browneが1534年2月1日にイギリススリーホールリーで生まれた時，父John Browneは21歳，母Joan Ferretは32歳であった。1558年11月14日にイギリススリーホールリーでMagdalene Elsickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1561年，イギリススリーホールリーでの職業はvicarと記録されている。彼は1613年11月14日にイギリススリーホールリーで79歳で死去し，イギリススリーホールリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Browne(이)가 1534년 2월 1일 영국 수리 호를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Browne(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ferret(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1558년 11월 14일 영국 수리 호를리에서 Magdalene Elsick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1561년, 그의 직업은 영국 수리 호를리에서 vicar이었다. 그는 1613년 11월 14일 영국 수리 호를리에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 호를리에 묻혔다.

pt.1 February 1534–14 November 1613: 1 de fevereiro de 1534–14 de novembro de 1613
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Browne nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1534, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Browne, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ferret, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Magdalene Elsick em 14 de novembro de 1558, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1561, sua profissão aparece como vicar em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1613, em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Browne родился 1 февраля 1534 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени John Browne было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Ferret, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Magdalene Elsick 14 ноября 1558 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1561 году он работал по профессии vicar в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия. Он умер 14 ноября 1613 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия.

es.1 February 1534–14 November 1613: 1 de febrero de 1534–14 de noviembre de 1613
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Browne nació el 1 de febrero de 1534, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Browne, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Ferret, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Magdalene Elsick el 14 de noviembre de 1558, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1561, su ocupación registrada era vicar en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1613, en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Horley, Surrey, Inglaterra.
